content.json:
Sort by **KnownBad** then **MaxSuspicion** (heatmap). Chrome/Edge store links are populated for every row - if one 404s, click the other.
Firefox has no deterministic ID; the AMO link is a search - pivot on `SHA256s` (VT/MDTI) or inspect `manifest.json` inside the renamed `.xpi`.

content.query:
// Installed browser extensions found on disk - rare / known-bad / out-of-profile
// Performance: indexed positive filters first, then cheap negatives, then string ops.
let ExtensionWhitelist = dynamic([
    "ljanpepaipafblfikgiokdoccjbckfbf","afdpoidmelmfapkoikmenejmcdpgecfe",
    "cokbpgemipiebgbmnnlfboefilmdlonm","ncphcdigcdkjeagemagmchkgommoifjd",
    "aternity-webext-12.2.4@aternity.com.xpi",
    "jmjflgjpcpepeafmmgdpfkogkghcpiha","gamjhjfeblghkihfjdpmbpajhlpmobbp",
    "ljglajjnnkapghbckkcmodicjhacbfhk","kagpabjoboikccfdghpdlaaopmgpgfdc",
    "ppnbnpeolgkicgegkbkbjmhlideopiji","hkbpopdgcjpgknlljklheebmnpiplnji",
    "bkbeeeffjjeopflfhgeknacdieedcoml","ghbmnnjooekpmoecnnnilnnbdlolhkhi",
    "aohghmighlieiainnegkcijnfilokake","aapocclcgogkmnckokdopfmhonfmgoek",
    "felcaaldnbdncclmgdcncolpebgiejap","blpcfgokakmgnkcojhhkbfbldkacnbeo",
    "nmmhkkegccagdldgiimedpiccmgmieda","efaidnbmnnnibpcajpcglclefindmkaj",
    "aeblfdkhhhdcdjpifhhbdiojplfjncoa","hdokiejnpimakedhajhdlcegeplioahd",
    "nngceckbapebfimnlniiiahkandclblb","globoedmnnhjjbdbjpicdojcdmdlhpan",
    "loccoehoeckjmaecdmnkbeflhjijlnig","kgjfgplpablkjnlkjmjdecgdpfankdle",
    "jndclpdbaamdhonoechobihbbiimdgai","kbfnbcaeplbcioakkpcpgfkobkghlhen",
    "gighmmpiobklfepjocnamgkkbiglidom","cfhdojbkjhnklbpkdaibdccddilifddb",
    "cjpalhdlnbpafiamejdnhcphjbkeiagm","bmnlcjabgnpnenekpadlanbbkooimhnj",
    "niloccemoadcdkdjlinkgdfekeahmflj","maafgiompdekodanheihhgilkjchcakm",
    "newtab@mozilla.org.xpi"
]);
let KnownBadIDs = dynamic([
    "nnpnnpemnckcfdebeekibpiijlicmpom","acmacodkjbdgmoleebolmdjonilkdbch",
    "mnhffkhmpnefgklngfmlndmkimimbphc","kkodiihpgodmdankclfibbiphjkfdenh",
    "oaikpkmjciadfpddlpjjdapglcihgdle","jaceimaopfeahjpcdgflnnoeegmckaoo",
    "hihblcmlaaademjlakdpicchbjnnnkbo"
]);
let BrowserProcs = dynamic([
    "chrome.exe","msedge.exe","brave.exe","opera.exe","vivaldi.exe",
    "firefox.exe","MicrosoftEdgeUpdate.exe","GoogleUpdate.exe",
    "setup.exe","chrome_installer.exe"
]);
DeviceFileEvents
| where FolderPath has_any ("Extensions", "extensions")
| where FolderPath has_any (
    @"AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data",
    @"AppData\Local\Microsoft\Edge\User Data",
    @"AppData\Local\BraveSoftware\Brave-Browser\User Data",
    @"AppData\Roaming\Mozilla\Firefox\Profiles")
| where FolderPath startswith @"C:\Users\" or FolderPath startswith @"%systemdrive%\users\"
| where ActionType != "FileDeleted"
| where FileName !startswith "*"
| where FolderPath !has "CRX_INSTALL"
| extend Browser = case(
    FolderPath has "BraveSoftware",       "Brave",
    FolderPath has @"\Microsoft\Edge\", "Edge",
    FolderPath has @"\Google\Chrome\",  "Chrome",
    FolderPath has "Firefox",             "FireFox",
    "Unknown")
| extend ID = iff(Browser in ("Chrome","Edge","Brave"),
                  tolower(extract(@"(?i)extensions\\(\w+)\\", 1, FolderPath)),
                  tolower(FileName))
| where isnotempty(ID)
    and ID !in ("temp","trash","staged")
    and (Browser != "FireFox" or FileName endswith ".xpi")
    and ID !in (ExtensionWhitelist)
| extend KnownBad = ID in (KnownBadIDs)
| extend StoreLookup = case(
    Browser in ("Chrome","Brave"), strcat("https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/", ID),
    Browser == "Edge",              strcat("https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/", ID),
    Browser == "FireFox",           strcat("https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/search/?q=",
                                            url_encode_component(replace_string(replace_string(tostring(FileName),".xpi",""),"@"," "))),
    "")
| extend AltStoreLookup = case(
    Browser == "Chrome", strcat("https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/", ID),
    Browser == "Edge",   strcat("https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/", ID),
    Browser == "Brave",  strcat("https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/", ID),
    "")
| extend InBrowserProfile = FolderPath has_any (
    @"AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data\Default",
    @"AppData\Local\Microsoft\Edge\User Data\Default",
    @"AppData\Local\BraveSoftware\Brave-Browser\User Data\Default",
    @"AppData\Roaming\Mozilla\Firefox\Profiles")
| extend DropperIsBrowser = tostring(InitiatingProcessFileName) in~ (BrowserProcs)
| extend SuspicionScore =
        toint(KnownBad) * 5
      + toint(not(InBrowserProfile))
      + toint(not(DropperIsBrowser))
      + toint(InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\Temp\", @"\Downloads\", @"\Public\"))
| summarize
    FirstSeen          = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen           = max(TimeGenerated),
    DeviceCount        = dcount(DeviceName),
    Devices            = make_set(DeviceName, 50),
    FolderPaths        = make_set(FolderPath, 10),
    Droppers           = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10),
    DropperPaths       = make_set(InitiatingProcessFolderPath, 10),
    Accounts           = make_set(InitiatingProcessAccountName, 10),
    SHA256s            = make_set(SHA256, 10),
    KnownBad           = max(toint(KnownBad)),
    OutOfProfile       = max(toint(not(InBrowserProfile))),
    NonBrowserDropper  = max(toint(not(DropperIsBrowser))),
    MaxSuspicion       = max(SuspicionScore)
    by ID, Browser, StoreLookup, AltStoreLookup
| sort by KnownBad desc, MaxSuspicion desc, DeviceCount asc
content.title: Installed Browser Extensions - Rare or Known-Bad

content.query:
// Known-Bad & Rare .crx (Chrome/Edge Extension) drops with extension IDs in the filename
// Threat intel: Cyberhaven (Dec 2024), SquareX Syncjacking (2025), RedDirection (2025), GreedyBear (2025).
let ExtensionWhitelist = dynamic([
    "ljanpepaipafblfikgiokdoccjbckfbf","afdpoidmelmfapkoikmenejmcdpgecfe",
    "cokbpgemipiebgbmnnlfboefilmdlonm","ncphcdigcdkjeagemagmchkgommoifjd",
    "jmjflgjpcpepeafmmgdpfkogkghcpiha","gamjhjfeblghkihfjdpmbpajhlpmobbp",
    "ljglajjnnkapghbckkcmodicjhacbfhk","kagpabjoboikccfdghpdlaaopmgpgfdc",
    "ppnbnpeolgkicgegkbkbjmhlideopiji","hkbpopdgcjpgknlljklheebmnpiplnji",
    "bkbeeeffjjeopflfhgeknacdieedcoml","ghbmnnjooekpmoecnnnilnnbdlolhkhi",
    "aohghmighlieiainnegkcijnfilokake","aapocclcgogkmnckokdopfmhonfmgoek",
    "felcaaldnbdncclmgdcncolpebgiejap","blpcfgokakmgnkcojhhkbfbldkacnbeo",
    "nmmhkkegccagdldgiimedpiccmgmieda","efaidnbmnnnibpcajpcglclefindmkaj",
    "aeblfdkhhhdcdjpifhhbdiojplfjncoa","hdokiejnpimakedhajhdlcegeplioahd",
    "nngceckbapebfimnlniiiahkandclblb","globoedmnnhjjbdbjpicdojcdmdlhpan",
    "loccoehoeckjmaecdmnkbeflhjijlnig","kgjfgplpablkjnlkjmjdecgdpfankdle",
    "jndclpdbaamdhonoechobihbbiimdgai","kbfnbcaeplbcioakkpcpgfkobkghlhen",
    "gighmmpiobklfepjocnamgkkbiglidom","cfhdojbkjhnklbpkdaibdccddilifddb",
    "cjpalhdlnbpafiamejdnhcphjbkeiagm","bmnlcjabgnpnenekpadlanbbkooimhnj",
    "niloccemoadcdkdjlinkgdfekeahmflj","maafgiompdekodanheihhgilkjchcakm"
]);
let KnownBadIDs = dynamic([
    "nnpnnpemnckcfdebeekibpiijlicmpom","acmacodkjbdgmoleebolmdjonilkdbch",
    "mnhffkhmpnefgklngfmlndmkimimbphc","kkodiihpgodmdankclfibbiphjkfdenh",
    "oaikpkmjciadfpddlpjjdapglcihgdle","jaceimaopfeahjpcdgflnnoeegmckaoo",
    "hihblcmlaaademjlakdpicchbjnnnkbo"
]);
let BrowserProcs = dynamic([
    "chrome.exe","msedge.exe","brave.exe","opera.exe","vivaldi.exe",
    "firefox.exe","MicrosoftEdgeUpdate.exe","GoogleUpdate.exe",
    "setup.exe","chrome_installer.exe"
]);
DeviceFileEvents
| where FileName has_cs ".crx"
| where ActionType != "FileDeleted"
| where FileName endswith ".crx"
| where FileName !startswith "*"
| extend PotentialExtensionID = tolower(extract(@"^([A-Za-z]{32})_", 1, FileName))
| where isnotempty(PotentialExtensionID) and PotentialExtensionID !in (ExtensionWhitelist)
| extend KnownBad = PotentialExtensionID in (KnownBadIDs)
| extend InBrowserProfile = FolderPath has_any (
    @"AppData\Local\Google\Chrome",
    @"AppData\Local\Microsoft\Edge",
    @"AppData\Local\BraveSoftware",
    @"AppData\Roaming\Mozilla\Firefox",
    "msedge_url_fetcher_",
    "chromecrx_chrome_url_fetcher_")
| extend DropperIsBrowser = tostring(InitiatingProcessFileName) in~ (BrowserProcs)
| extend SuspicionScore =
        toint(KnownBad) * 5
      + toint(not(InBrowserProfile))
      + toint(not(DropperIsBrowser))
      + toint(InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\Temp\", @"\Downloads\", @"\Public\"))
| extend PotentialChromeExtensionLink = strcat("https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/", PotentialExtensionID)
| extend PotentialEdgeExtensionLink   = strcat("https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/", PotentialExtensionID)
| summarize
    FirstSeen          = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen           = max(TimeGenerated),
    DeviceCount        = dcount(DeviceName),
    Devices            = make_set(DeviceName, 50),
    FolderPaths        = make_set(FolderPath, 10),
    Droppers           = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10),
    DropperPaths       = make_set(InitiatingProcessFolderPath, 10),
    Accounts           = make_set(InitiatingProcessAccountName, 10),
    FileNames          = make_set(FileName, 10),
    SHA256s            = make_set(SHA256, 10),
    KnownBad           = max(toint(KnownBad)),
    OutOfProfile       = max(toint(not(InBrowserProfile))),
    NonBrowserDropper  = max(toint(not(DropperIsBrowser))),
    MaxSuspicion       = max(SuspicionScore)
    by PotentialExtensionID, PotentialChromeExtensionLink, PotentialEdgeExtensionLink
| sort by KnownBad desc, MaxSuspicion desc, DeviceCount asc
content.title: Known-Bad & Rare .crx Drops (with extension IDs)

content.query:
// Suspicious No-ID .crx Drops - dropper + path scored
// Known-benign vendor drops are flagged (KnownBenign=1) but kept visible.
let CrxFilenameWhitelist = dynamic([
    "pad_extension_for_chrome",      // Microsoft Power Automate Desktop
    "pad_extension_for_msedge"       // Microsoft Power Automate Desktop
]);
let BenignFolderPaths = dynamic([
    @"\WindowsApps\Microsoft.PowerAutomateDesktop"
]);
let BrowserProcs = dynamic([
    "chrome.exe","msedge.exe","brave.exe","opera.exe","vivaldi.exe",
    "firefox.exe","MicrosoftEdgeUpdate.exe","GoogleUpdate.exe",
    "setup.exe","chrome_installer.exe"
]);
DeviceFileEvents
| where FileName has_cs ".crx"
| where ActionType != "FileDeleted"
| where FileName endswith ".crx"
| where FileName !startswith "*"
| where isnotempty(SHA256)
| where isempty(extract(@"^([A-Za-z]{32})_", 1, FileName))
| extend KnownBenign = FileName has_any (CrxFilenameWhitelist)
                    or FolderPath has_any (BenignFolderPaths)
| extend InBrowserProfile = FolderPath has_any (
    @"AppData\Local\Google\Chrome",
    @"AppData\Local\Microsoft\Edge",
    @"AppData\Local\BraveSoftware",
    @"AppData\Roaming\Mozilla\Firefox",
    "msedge_url_fetcher_",
    "chromecrx_chrome_url_fetcher_")
| extend DropperIsBrowser = tostring(InitiatingProcessFileName) in~ (BrowserProcs)
// Benign rows score 0; everything else uses normal weighted score
| extend SuspicionScore = iff(KnownBenign, 0,
        toint(not(InBrowserProfile))
      + toint(not(DropperIsBrowser))
      + toint(InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\Temp\", @"\Downloads\", @"\Public\")))
| summarize
    FirstSeen          = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen           = max(TimeGenerated),
    DeviceCount        = dcount(DeviceName),
    Devices            = make_set(DeviceName, 50),
    FolderPaths        = make_set(FolderPath, 10),
    Droppers           = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10),
    DropperPaths       = make_set(InitiatingProcessFolderPath, 10),
    Accounts           = make_set(InitiatingProcessAccountName, 10),
    SHA256s            = make_set(SHA256, 10),
    KnownBenign        = max(toint(KnownBenign)),
    OutOfProfile       = max(toint(not(InBrowserProfile))),
    NonBrowserDropper  = max(toint(not(DropperIsBrowser))),
    MaxSuspicion       = max(SuspicionScore)
    by FileName
| where DeviceCount <= toint('{DeviceCount}')
| sort by MaxSuspicion desc, KnownBenign asc, DeviceCount desc
content.title: Suspicious No-ID .crx Drops (dropper + path scored)
